tagline: Meet nearby people who can actually help.

designSystem.style: Dark hyperlocal social app with teal accent, warm amber highlights, and card-based layout. Uses trust badge system with color-coded categories, contextual map visualization, and ephemeral request threads. Micro-interactions on tab switches and post steps. Professional yet approachable with geo-proximity emphasis.

screens: Feed — Browse active neighborhood help requests with filter chips, urgency indicators, like/reply actions, and distance labels
Request Detail — Thread view for a single request with replies, offer help CTA, and inline reply input
Skill Map — Visual neighborhood map with skill-tagged dots, skill grid showing neighbor counts, and top helper leaderboard
New Request — 3-step post flow: select category → describe need → set radius/expiry/anonymous options
Messages — Inbox with direct threads, community updates, and badge notifications grouped by type
Profile — User trust profile with stat strip, earned badges grid, skills list, and recent activity feed
